title: Fashion Editorial Grid 2 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: fashion editorial grid featuring adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions. Subject: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions appears across a cohesive set of editorial moments with consistent identity, styling, and polished expression. Scene: warm ivory magazine collage board with paper frames, soft shadows, and clean moodboard spacing provides the contact-sheet or collage surface while standing pose, seated pose, side glance, soft smile, close portrait, and walking candid creates visual variety. Composition: Fixed editorial grid or collage composition with repeated frames, consistent spacing, paper-like hierarchy, and clear pose variation. Style: Magazine contact-sheet aesthetic with polished fashion photography, refined layout rhythm, subtle paper texture, and premium editorial cohesion. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: adult East Asian creative director with calm confidence and realistic proportions, standing pose, seated pose, side glance, soft smile, close portrait, and walking candid, cream knit cardigan, pleated skirt, ankle boots, delicate earrings, and soft editorial layers, and warm ivory magazine collage board with paper frames, soft shadows, and clean moodboard spacing define the reusable fashion-grid mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: fashion editorial grid featuring adult Black fashion stylist with short curls, natural expression, and confident posture. Subject: adult Black fashion stylist with short curls, natural expression, and confident posture appears across a cohesive set of editorial moments with consistent identity, styling, and polished expression.
